import pytest
from source import filter_expensive_items


def test_filter_expensive_items_handles_string_price_without_type_error():
    items = [
        {'name': 'A', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'C', 'price': 50}
    ]
    threshold = 150
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    expected_names = ['B']
    assert [item['name'] for item in result] == expected_names, (
        f"Expected items with names {expected_names} for threshold {threshold}, "
        f"but got {[item['name'] for item in result]}"
    )
